general-swe.name: General Software Engineer
general-swe.description: Software engineering roles with flexible tech requirements

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
jobs.description:
Role Overview

Join Foundation Health as a Senior Software Engineer to help transform healthcare through an AI-powered digital pharmacy platform. You will be part of a team that fosters a culture of innovation, creativity, and forward-thinking. The role requires a proven track record of shipping production-grade applications from scratch, with a focus on AI-native mindset and technical leadership.

What You Will Do</
